content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/services/storyforge.service.ts", "summary": "The StoryForgeService manages interactions with a backend API for ingesting PDFs and code, assessing them to generate user stories, and managing the review process. It provides methods to submit files for assessment, retrieve job statuses, answer clarifications, approve reviews, and download generated documents.", "rules": [{"name": "Ingestion Validation", "description": "Ensures that only valid file paths are submitted for ingestion.", "conditions": ["folderPath is a string"], "actions": ["Returns an observable with job_id and status"]}, {"name": "Assessment Submission", "description": "Validates the submission of files for assessment, ensuring all required parameters are provided.", "conditions": ["file is a File object", "ppmNumber, ppmName, systemName are strings", "reviewMode is a boolean"], "actions": ["Returns an observable with job_id"]}, {"name": "Job Status Retrieval", "description": "Fetches the status of jobs submitted for assessment.", "conditions": ["jobId is a string"], "actions": ["Returns an observable with JobSummary or StoryForgeJobState"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/common/http", "@angular/core", "rxjs"]}
